description: Recto: Fragment of a letter from Shemuel Gaon b. Hofni to one of the main members of the community in Fustat. Dated: Av 1319 Seleucid, which is July/August 1008 CE. In the handwriting of Yisraʾel ha-Kohen b. Shemuel b. Ḥofni (according to Gil). The sender asks the addressee to keep sending him letters. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 2, #55.) VMR
description_he: שרידי מכתב משמואל גאון בן חופני לאחד מחשובי פוסטאט, אב 1319 סלוקי, בקשה להמשיך לשלוח מכתבים
